infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pet Health Care uses your photos and videos for pet profiles, wellness screening, breed recognition, and Pet Feed listings.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pet Health Care uses the camera so you can capture pet photos or videos for wellness screening, breed recognition, and Pet Feed listings.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Pet Health Care uses the microphone only when you capture videos with sound for pet wellness screening or Pet Feed listings.
